message:
feat(web): utilities page with giil/csctf/xf/pt workflows (bd-2n73.10)

Add /utilities route with tool management UI: utility listing with
install status from doctor endpoint, giil image download panel, csctf
chat transcript export, xf archive search, and pt process triage.
Includes sidebar nav link, skeleton loader, and lazy loading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
